Title: N'na baka na! Tsuchi kara umareta Saibaiman
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Toshio Furukawa, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Nappa destroys East City, and he and Vegeta head toward Piccolo and Gohan; the other Z Senshi also fly to where the battle is going to take place, with Kuririn arriving first; Yajirobe tells a group of people about the Saiyajin.
